title: Distribution
description: A specific representation of a dataset, such as a file, feed, or API response

representationTechnique.title: representation technique
representationTechnique.description: Method or schema used to structure the distribution content (for example, CSV convention, XML schema, or spatial representation type)

status.title: lifecycle status
status.description: The status of the distribution in the context of maturity lifecycle

characterEncoding.title: character encoding
characterEncoding.description: List of character encodings used in the Distribution, using IANA character set names (for example, UTF-8)

accessService.title: access service
accessService.description: A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset

accessURL.title: access URL
accessURL.description: URL for indirect access to the Distribution (for example, a landing page, API docs, or request form), not a direct file download

byteSize.title: byte size
byteSize.description: The size of a Distribution in bytes

compressFormat.title: compression format
compressFormat.description: The format of the file in which the data is contained in a compressed form, e.g. to reduce the size of the downloadable file

downloadURL.title: download URL
downloadURL.description: Direct URL to a downloadable file for the Distribution; use accessURL for indirect access

mediaType.title: media type
mediaType.description: MIME type of the Distribution (for example, text/csv or application/json), from the IANA media types registry: https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml

packageFormat.title: packaging format
packageFormat.description: The format of the file in which one or more data files are grouped together, e.g. to enable a set of related files to be downloaded together

spatialResolutionInMeters.title: Spatial resolution (meters)
spatialResolutionInMeters.description: The minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset distribution, measured in meters

temporalResolution.title: termporal resolution
temporalResolution.description: The minimum time period resolvable in the dataset distribution

availability.title: availability
availability.description: An indication how long it is planned to keep the Distribution of the Dataset available

accessRestriction.title: access restriction
accessRestriction.description: List of access restrictions related to the distribution

cuiRestriction.title: CUI restriction
cuiRestriction.description: Controlled Unclassified Information restriction related to the distribution

describedBy.title: data dictionary
describedBy.description: A distribution containing the Data Dictionary for this distribution

anyOf.description: inline description of the data dictionary

useRestriction.title: use restriction
useRestriction.description: Use restriction related to the distribution

accessRights.title: access rights
accessRights.description: Information about whether the distribution is publicly accessible, restricted, or not public

anyOf.description: Text description of the access rights

conformsTo.title: linked schemas
conformsTo.description: List of standards, schemas, or reference systems the Distribution follows (prefer stable URIs when available)

_oldDocs.range: dcterms:Standard (A basis for comparison; a reference point against which other things can be evaluated.)

description.title: description
examples: Daily climate observations in CSV format.
A CSV file containing historical climate data including daily temperature and precipitation readings.

format.title: format
format.description: A human-readable description of the file format of the Distribution that provides useful information that might not be apparent from mediaType

identifier.title: identifier
identifier.description: The unique identifier for the Distribution (e.g. DOI, ISBN)

otherIdentifier.title: other identifier
otherIdentifier.description: A list of identifiers for the Distribution besides the main identifier, e.g. the URI or other unique identifiers in the context of the Catalog

issued.title: release date
issued.description: The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Distribution

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

_oldDocs.range: rdfs:Literal (typed as xsd:date, xsd:dateTime, xsd:gYear or xsd:gYearMonth)

language.title: language
language.description: ISO 639-1 language code values used in the distribution metadata text, such as en or es, full list can be seen at https://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/iso639-1.html

license.title: license
license.description: License that governs how the distribution can be used or reused

modified.title: last modified
modified.description: The most recent date on which the Distribution was changed or modified

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

_oldDocs.range: rdfs:Literal (typed as xsd:date, xsd:dateTime, xsd:gYear or xsd:gYearMonth)

rights.title: rights
rights.description: Rights statements not already covered by license or accessRights, such as copyright or policy restrictions

items.description: Full text of a statement of rights

examples: No rights reserved. This data is in the public domain.
This data is in the public domain and may be used without restriction.

hasQualityMeasurement.title: quality measurement
hasQualityMeasurement.description: Quality measurements for the distribution (for example, completeness, accuracy, or timeliness)

page.title: documentation
page.description: A page or document about this Distribution

image.title: image
image.description: A link to a thumbnail picture illustrating the content of the distribution

checksum.title: checksum
checksum.description: Checksum used to verify that the downloadable file content has not changed

_oldDocs.rationale: The update to DCAT 3 dcat:Distribution is of paramount significance as it greatly enhances data accessibility. It introduces a more comprehensive and structured approach to describing data distributions, ensuring that data consumers can easily understand and access the data in the format that best suits their needs, ultimately fostering greater data utilization and dissemination.

examples.title: Climate Data CSV
examples.description: Daily climate observations in CSV format.
rights: No rights reserved. This data is in the public domain.
